channel.title: People / Publication & Inspiration / International on Design Moodboard Archive
channel.description: Recent content in People / Publication & Inspiration / International on Design Moodboard Archive

item.title: House and Garden UK
item.description: House & Garden UK is a browsing source for layered interiors, English houses, decoration advice, garden ideas, shopping, property, travel, and design history. The homepage surfaces house tours, decorating dos and don’ts, archive roundups, shopping, exhibitions, bathrooms, recipes, and HG101 reference pieces. Save this for traditional and eclectic house inspiration, source discovery, designer names, image-rich home tours, and the kind of interiors that reward slow archive browsing.

item.title: NYDC
item.description: NYDC is more of a design-resource hub than a designer. The New York Design Center at 200 Lex houses nearly 100 showrooms representing more than 500 lines across traditional, contemporary, residential, and contract furniture, plus fabric, floor covering, lighting, wallcovering, kitchen and bath, and decorative accessory resources. Save for showroom discovery, product sourcing, textiles, antiques, trade resources, events, and “where did this designer source that?” research. This may eventually belong in Stores as a directory/source hub too.

item.title: Spanish Style Home
item.description: From the visible Instagram profile: Spanish Style Home is run by Fernando Amaya, a Spanish Style Home specialist helping families sell, buy, and design Spanish-style homes in Southern California. Highlights include Community and Family. Save this as a style-specific architecture and real-estate inspiration source for Spanish-style homes: arches, clay tile, courtyards, plaster, ironwork, carved wood, warm materials, indoor-outdoor transitions, and SoCal Spanish revival references. It is more publication/inspiration and property/design source than a conventional interior designer.
